$comment: GitHub App manifest for ShipIt-AI. Reference shape — the live manifest served at GET /api/connectors/github/manifest substitutes hook_attributes.url and redirect_url from the runtime config so each instance points at its own webhook + callback URLs. Keep this file in sync with what the v1 connector actually needs; permission drift here vs. fetchers/normalizers will surface as 403s during the probe step.
name: ShipIt-AI
description: ShipIt-AI maps your software ecosystem into a Neo4j knowledge graph and exposes it to AI agents via MCP. Read-only access to repositories, teams, members, workflows, deployments, and branch-protection state.
